description: The 'TreatmentPlanner' project depends on a legacy library 'dose-engine.jar' located in the project's lib folder. You need to inspect the proprietary dose calculation formulas in the 'DoseCalculator' class, but the source code is not currently attached. Attach the source code archive located at '/home/ga/Downloads/dose-engine-src.zip' to the 'dose-engine.jar' library within the 'TreatmentPlanner' project so that the source code for 'com.dosimetry.engine.DoseCalculator' is visible in the editor.
